title_es: Cúrcuma: La Especia Dorada con Superpoderes
hook_en: Watch this! Boost turmeric's power with a simple trick!
hook_es: ¡Mira esto! Potencia la cúrcuma con un truco simple!
key_message: Pair turmeric with black pepper to increase curcumin absorption by 2000%.
visual_elements: Quick demo of making a turmeric latte
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Turmeric — Curcumin (active compound) has powerful anti-inflammatory properties (Tip: Pair with black pepper to increase absorption by 2000%)

title_en: How to Choose the Best Turmeric at the Store
title_es: Cómo Elegir la Mejor Cúrcuma en la Tienda
hook_en: Stop! Are you buying the best turmeric?
key_message: Choose turmeric with high curcumin content for maximum health benefits.
visual_elements: Holding up organic vs. non-organic turmeric
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Turmeric — Curcumin (active compound) has powerful anti-inflammatory properties (Tip: Pair with black pepper to increase absorption by 2000%)
